Source.Name: cliphist
Source.Summary: Wayland clipboard manager with support for multimedia
Source.Description: cliphist is a clipboard history manager for Wayland. It listens for clipboard changes and writes them to a history file using wl-clipboard. History can be recalled and piped into any picker (dmenu, rofi, fuzzel, wofi, etc.). Both text and images are supported, and clipboard content is preserved byte-for-byte, including leading/trailing whitespace and newlines.

Package.Name: cliphist
Package.Summary: Wayland clipboard manager with support for multimedia
Package.Description: cliphist is a clipboard history manager for Wayland. It listens for clipboard changes and writes them to a history file using wl-clipboard. History can be recalled and piped into any picker (dmenu, rofi, fuzzel, wofi, etc.). Both text and images are supported, and clipboard content is preserved byte-for-byte, including leading/trailing whitespace and newlines.
